candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line with populated values; more specific and preferable to broader total rows.
Revenue total and good fallback if primary label changes across years.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue; later code should take first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales line; matches total direct production/service costs.
Component of cost of revenues, but less complete than the direct total COGS line.
COGS component, not full cost of sales.
COGS component, not full cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and already excludes R&D, which is ideal for PROF overhead input.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

Additional SG&A component, but inferior to the explicit SG&A row.
Too broad and includes COGS/other items; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line, but presented in supplemental section below EBIT.
Capitalized portion only, not full R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Not an R&D expense line; indicates SG&A excluding R&D.

variables.notes: XSGA choice explicitly excludes R&D, so XRD is set to empty to avoid subtracting R&D again in PROF. The available R&D lines are supplemental and below EBIT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest expense line; more specific than net finance cost and avoids non-interest finance items.
Also a direct interest expense line with identical values; good fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component, but likely already included in total interest expense; selecting it as well would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list of equivalent direct interest expense labels; do not sum them. Later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner-attributable equity line and excludes minority interest by construction.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner-attributable equity line; good fallback if primary label changes.
Also appears equivalent here, but less explicit about parent attribution than the first two.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Too broad and only needed if no parent-only equity line exists.

Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list for book equity, preferring parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.
